parents.subject: LU-19003 ptlrpc: prevent freed memory access in ptlrpcd_init()

commit.subject: LU-18135 tests: run sanity-lnet/250 on RHEL 9.6 client
commit.message:
LU-18135 tests: run sanity-lnet/250 on RHEL 9.6 client

This patch is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes,ONLY=250 \
  mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 fstype=ldiskfs \
  clientdistro=el9.6 testlist=sanity-lnet

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes \
  mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 fstype=ldiskfs \
  clientdistro=el9.6 testlist=sanity-lnet

Change-Id: Icbae9060662673d12fecb0edea01dcc7a491a94b
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
